flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pepperdine University rose 22% between 2007 and 2010 ($15.1k → $18.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pepperdine University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.7k → $69.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pepperdine University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
